replay_posture: cold-boot + live Convex dev + real iOS simulator

flows.summary: Geospatial index seeded from curated_routes centroids; re-running the seed is idempotent (no duplicates).
flows.run_note: Canary confirms the seed indirectly (it queries listCuratedRoutes which depends on the geospatial index). Direct seed-idempotency assertion belongs to the DATA-001 task's own integration test.

flows.summary: OPS-001 canary catches an empty or drifted Convex deployment loudly before any subscription silently renders an empty UI.
Pure UI↔DB archetype map applied in the read path so each UI archetype value returns routes from the live catalog.
An unknown archetype string passes through without crashing the read path.

flows.surface: Convex read path (state normalize + length clamp)
flows.summary: Dirty state strings normalized to canonical form; junk lengthMiles clamped (>999 → '1000+ mi', ≤0 → hidden).

flows.surface: Convex read path (blank state + extreme length)
flows.summary: Null/empty state still surfaces in nearest-first results; extreme lengthMiles is clamped/hidden, not rendered as a junk number.
listCuratedRoutes serves all 4 browse modes (bbox, center+radius, state, archetype[]), Clerk-gated, scores on 0–1 scale.
Empty bbox returns []; missing center falls back to best-first; zero-match state returns [].
Hook returns rows in the {id,name,lat,lng,archetype,compositeScore,distanceMi} shape; loading vs empty distinguished; composite on raw 0–1 scale.

flows.surface: useCuratedDiscovery hook (loading vs empty + unlocated fallback)
flows.summary: Loading≠empty distinction holds; unlocated → best-first fallback (no zero-center query, no error).

flows.surface: Plan view (map + chat home) — suggestion cards over input → direct plot on tap
flows.summary: With no route on the map, curated-route suggestion cards over the chat input offer whole roads from the live 5,654-route catalog; tapping one plots that exact route on the map immediately, no chat round-trip; cards disappear once the route is shown.
flows.run_note: Pass -e EMAIL / -e PASSWORD for the test Clerk account; set a simulated device location so 'nearest' cards resolve. Covers gate steps 2, 3 (and 0/1 as preconditions).

flows.surface: Plan view (cards return on clear + empty-catalog state)
flows.summary: Clearing/dismissing the displayed route brings the suggestion cards back; if the catalog is empty for the rider's region, the slot shows nothing (no generic IDLE_SUGGESTIONS planning prompts leak).
flows.run_note: Covers gate step 4 (clear route → cards return). The empty-catalog branch is covered by DATA-005 edge + DISC-017's vitest; the Maestro flow covers the cards-return- on-clear surface.

flows.surface: Plan view (chat NL discovery → card→map loop)
flows.summary: Chat 'twisties near Asheville' / 'scenic roads in North Carolina' routes through the agent discoverCuratedRoutes tool, returns curated routes as chat cards with real non-zero scores, latest plots on map, earlier-card tap re-renders.
flows.run_note: Covers gate steps 5, 6, 7. Uses the real agent + real Convex — the determinism seam fixtures intent at the engine side, but the Maestro flow exercises the full NL path end-to-end.

flows.surface: Plan view (zero-score bug fixed + no-result intent)
flows.summary: Chat cards show real non-zero scores (the all-zero-bars bug from DATA-008b is fixed); a no-result intent renders an empty result without plotting a phantom route.
flows.run_note: Gate step 5 asserts 'card shows a real composite score (NN/100, never 0/100)'. No-result-intent assertion is supplementary in the DATA-008b task's integration test.

flows.surface: App launch + plan view + footer button
flows.summary: App cold-launches to the route plan view (no separate Discover screen, no filter-bar/sort-toggle/state-picker, no 'Plan a ride' drawer entry); the full-chat footer button is visually distinct from send.
flows.run_note: Covers gate steps 0, 1, 8. The flow's launchApp clears state/keychain (cold boot).

flows.summary: The dedicated-discovery components (discover.tsx, RouteDiscoveryScreen, filter-bar, sort-toggle, state-picker) are quarantined so none is imported by an active screen/hook.
